---
# Atom spec template — DO NOT edit this file.
# Copy to a new file named atom-<NNN>-<slug>.md and fill in.

id:                atom-NNN-short-slug
title:             One-line title
surface:           skill | upgrade-system | shared      # plan §1.1
change_caution:    low | medium | high                  # §1.4.6 / §2.3.15 high examples
owner_persona:     chief-of-staff | skill-architect | eval-lead | release-manager | downstream-compat-lead
source_lines:
  file:            skill/path/to/file.md
  from_line:       0
  to_line:         0
related_atoms:     []                                   # other atom IDs
scenarios:
  red_tier3:       []                                   # paths under upgrade-system/scenarios/
  red_tier4:       []
  red_tier5:       []
invariants:        []                                   # drawn from skill/protocol/invariants.md
---

# atom-NNN — <Title>

## Purpose

One paragraph. What this atom is responsible for inside the shipped skill.

## Behavior under change

What will break if this atom changes? Who is affected?

## Tie to plan

Direct reference to the relevant section of `UPGRADE-SYSTEM-PLAN.md`.
Atoms must be traceable back to the plan.

## Dependencies

Other atoms that must hold for this one to work; other atoms that rely
on this one.

## Sign-off

- [ ] Peer-reviewed by `skill-architect`
- [ ] Scenarios committed red by `scenario-agent`
- [ ] Scenarios peer-reviewed by `eval-lead`
- [ ] Implementation lands scenarios green by `implementation-agent`
- [ ] F4 CI gate passes
